ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_assessment: High quality, clearly legible text-based PDF with all fields readable.

invoice.quality_assessment: High quality, clearly legible text-based PDF with all fields readable.

document_pairing.method: Order number match and consignor/consignee match
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate remarks field contains 'W268414' which matches invoice 'Our order number W268414'. Consignor 'Volvo Merchandise AB' matches invoice visiting address. Consignee matches invoice invoicing/delivery address.

criteria_met: Criterion 2: Consignor 'Volvo Merchandise AB' identified in invoice visiting address block.
Criterion 3: Consignee 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' identified in invoice invoicing address.
pairing_validation.notes: Both consignor and consignee can be identified in the invoice. Order number W268414 also matches.

locations.location: Visiting address block at bottom of page

rule_activation.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.

consignor.certificate_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons g 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden (Visiting address)

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name 'Volvo Merchandise AB' is the invoice issuer.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice is branded as VOLVO at top and the visiting address block explicitly names 'Volvo Merchandise AB' as the issuing entity. The invoicing address names the buyer (Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket), not the issuer. The invoice issuer is Volvo Merchandise AB per the visiting address block.

comparison_steps.description: Apply rule 4.1.0 – search for consignor name anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Consignor name 'Volvo Merchandise AB' found exactly in the visiting address block of the invoice: 'Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. MATCH via 4.1.0.

comparison_steps.description: Land verification for consignor.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: Sweden. Invoice visiting address: Sweden. Additionally confirmed via VAT number prefix 'SE' (SE556744915101) and IBAN prefix 'SE'. Country MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice visiting address block.
Land verification via explicit country in visiting address and VAT prefix SE.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Volvo Merchandise AB' in Sweden. The invoice is a proforma invoice issued by Volvo Merchandise AB (identified in the visiting address block at the bottom: 'Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'). The invoicing address at the top names the BUYER (Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket in Turkiye), not the seller. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name was searched across all text in the invoice and found exactly in the visiting address block. Country 'Sweden' matches between certificate and invoice. Minor address variation: certificate says 'Bror Nilssons g 5' vs invoice 'Bror Nilssons gata 5' — 'g' vs 'gata' is a permitted street-type normalization. Postal code 'SE-40508' vs '40508' is a minor formatting difference. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor might not match because the invoice top section (Invoicing address) names 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' which differs from the consignor.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoicing address identifies the BUYER, not the seller/issuer. The invoice issuer is identified in the visiting address block as 'Volvo Merchandise AB'. Rule 4.1.0 allows identification anywhere in the invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket, Fatih Sultan Mehmet Mah. Balkan No: 47 /7 Casper Plaza Omraniye, 34771 Istanbul, Turkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket, Fatih Sultan Mehmet Mah. Balkan No: 47/7 Casper Plaza Ümraniye, 34771 Istanbul, Türkiye (Invoicing address)

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in invoice using priority order (4.2.0.2). Search primary invoicing fields first.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice 'Invoicing address' field contains 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' — this is the primary billing/invoicing field and matches the certificate consignee name exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Name verification.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket'. Invoice invoicing address: 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket'. Exact match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Country verification.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Turkiye'. Invoice invoicing address: 'Türkiye'. Minor character variation (u vs ü) — same country. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1: Invoicing address field used as primary consignee identification.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' in Turkiye. Invoice invoicing address names exactly the same party: 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' at the same address in Turkiye. Minor character variation 'Omraniye' vs 'Ümraniye' and 'Turkiye' vs 'Türkiye' are minor diacritic/transliteration differences, not different names. Both the invoicing address and delivery address confirm the same party. Name: exact MATCH. Country: MATCH (Turkiye = Türkiye). Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Priority 1: Article number verification. Certificate lists article numbers 113974, 113597, 113599.
comparison_steps.result: All three article numbers found exactly in invoice item table: 113974, 113597, 113599. MATCH via article number.

comparison_steps.description: Text description verification for article 113974.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Renault Trucks K Rigid 8x4 1:43'. Invoice: 'Renault Trucks K Rigid 8x4 1:43'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Text description verification for article 113597.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1 :43'. Invoice: 'Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1 :43'. Match (space before colon is minor formatting).

comparison_steps.description: Text description verification for article 113599.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1 :24'. Invoice: 'Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1 :24'. Match.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number verification. All three article numbers exactly matched.
Text description verification confirms matching product descriptions.

evidence.notes: Article number 113974 and description match certificate line 1.
Article number 113597 and description match certificate line 2.
Article number 113599 and description match certificate line 3.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate lists three articles with article numbers and descriptions. All three article numbers (113974, 113597, 113599) are found exactly in the invoice item table. Product descriptions also match exactly for all three lines. Priority 1 (article number) verification is satisfied. Priority 2 (text) also confirms. Result: MATCH.

quantity.certificate_value: 113.30 KG GROSS (box 7); 32 Packages, 30 pcs + 75 pcs + 25 pcs (box 6)

comparison_steps.description: Identify verifiable quantity from certificate box 7: '113.30 KG GROSS'.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains '113.30 KG GROSS'. This is the verifying quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Weight category is GROSS (GW). Unit is KG. Value is 113.30.

comparison_steps.description: Direct identification check (4.4.1): Search for 113.30 as a total gross weight in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice does not contain a single total gross weight field showing 113.30. Invoice shows per-line Kg values: 23.34, 44.46, 45.50. No explicit total weight row found.

comparison_steps.description: Attempt undantag 3A (multiple invoices): Not applicable – only one invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Attempt undantag 3B (unit conversion MT↔KG): Not applicable – both sides in KG.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Attempt undantag 3C (per-unit weight derivation): Not applicable – certificate states total weight, not per-unit weight.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Attempt undantag 3D (summation of multiple rows within same invoice): Certificate states total quantity 113.30 KG GROSS. Invoice has three rows with Kg column values. Check if sum matches.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice rows: 23.34 + 44.46 + 45.50 = 113.30 KG. Certificate value: 113.30 KG GROSS. Sum = 113.30 exactly matches. All rows from same invoice and same order (W268414). Same unit (KG). All three rows correspond to the three articles in the certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Verify 3D conditions: (1) Certificate states total quantity ✓; (2) Invoice has multiple rows whose quantities sum to total ✓; (3) Same invoice/reference ✓; (4) Same unit (KG) ✓; (5) Only relevant article rows included ✓; (6) No conversion needed ✓; (7) Sum 113.30 = 113.30 within tolerance ✓.
comparison_steps.result: All 3D conditions satisfied. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (113.30 KG GROSS) is the verifying quantity.
Undantag 3D – Summation of row weights (23.34 + 44.46 + 45.50 = 113.30) matches certificate total.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '113.30 KG GROSS'. Invoice does not have a single total weight field. Applied undantag 3D (summation of multiple rows within same invoice): the three invoice rows show Kg values 23.34, 44.46, and 45.50. Sum = 23.34 + 44.46 + 45.50 = 113.30 KG, which exactly matches the certificate value. All rows are from the same invoice and correspond to the three articles listed in the certificate. Same unit (KG). Result: MATCH. Additionally, per-article quantities (30, 75, 25 pcs) from box 6 match invoice Qty column (30.00, 75.00, 25.00), providing further corroboration.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice Kg column might not represent gross weight, creating a category mismatch.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category naming does not in itself cause MISMATCH when the numerical value and unit match. The Kg column values sum exactly to the certificate's stated gross weight. No contradictory net weight column exists in the invoice.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: CN (CoO column for all three articles)

comparison_steps.description: Identify origin in invoice. Invoice has a 'CoO' column showing 'CN' for all three article rows.
comparison_steps.result: All three articles show CoO = CN. CN is the ISO alpha-2 code for China.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize and compare. Certificate: 'China'. Invoice: 'CN' (ISO code). Per rule 4.5.4, ISO code normalization is permitted.
comparison_steps.result: China = CN. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check for contradictory origins. All invoice lines show CN. No conflicting origins.
comparison_steps.result: No contradictions. Single origin confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Normalization of country name (China) to ISO code (CN).
Uniform origin – all articles show same origin CN.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'China' as country of origin. The invoice has an explicit 'CoO' (Country of Origin) column, and all three article rows show 'CN'. CN is the ISO alpha-2 code for China. Per rule 4.5.4, normalization from full name to ISO code is permitted. All articles confirm the same origin. Additionally, the certificate goods description includes 'CN' after each article line, which further corroborates Chinese origin. Result: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable – no LC reference found in certificate.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate contains no field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar. No LC exception activated.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Document A identified as certificate, Document B identified as invoice. Standard pairing.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate file contains one COO document. Invoice file contains one proforma invoice.
Consignor found in invoice visiting address. Consignee found in invoice invoicing address. Order number W268414 also matches.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Volvo Merchandise AB' found in visiting address block.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Exact name match in visiting address section of invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – Sweden confirmed via visiting address, VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order – invoicing address used
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – invoicing address names exact same party as certificate consignee.
rule_evaluation_log.details: Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket at same address in Turkiye.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – all three article numbers found exactly.
rule_evaluation_log.details: 113974, 113597, 113599 all present in invoice item table.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Undantag 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 23.34 + 44.46 + 45.50 = 113.30 KG matches certificate 113.30 KG GROSS.

rule_evaluation_log.details: All three article rows show CoO = CN = China.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Volvo Merchandise AB i Sverige identifieras i fakturans besöksadress, mottagaren Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket i Turkiet överensstämmer med fakturans faktureringsadress, alla tre artiklar med artikelnummer och beskrivningar matchar exakt, vikten 113,30 kg brutto bekräftas genom summering av fakturans radposter, och ursprungslandet Kina (CN) anges för samtliga artiklar i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_notes: Invoice is a proforma invoice rather than a commercial invoice. This does not affect verification but is noted.
Minor address spelling differences: 'Omraniye' vs 'Ümraniye', 'Turkiye' vs 'Türkiye', 'Bror Nilssons g' vs 'Bror Nilssons gata' — all permitted normalizations.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons g 5, SE-40508, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Volvo Merchandise AB, Bror Nilssons gata 5, 40508 GÖTEBORG, Sweden (Visiting address)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor name found in invoice visiting address block. Land verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Volvo Merchandise AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans besöksadressblock. Landet Sverige bekräftas via adressen och VAT-nummer med SE-prefix. Smärre adressvariationer (g vs gata, SE-40508 vs 40508) är tillåtna normaliseringar.

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket, Fatih Sultan Mehmet Mah. Balkan No: 47 /7 Casper Plaza Omraniye, 34771 Istanbul, Turkiye
sections.invoice_value: Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket, Fatih Sultan Mehmet Mah. Balkan No: 47/7 Casper Plaza Ümraniye, 34771 Istanbul, Türkiye (Invoicing address)

sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Volvo Group Otomotiv Ticaret Sirket' återfinns exakt i fakturans faktureringsadress. Adress och land (Turkiye/Türkiye) överensstämmer. Smärre diakritiska skillnader (Omraniye/Ümraniye, Turkiye/Türkiye) utgör tillåtna normaliseringar.

sections.certificate_value:
30 pcs - 113974 Renault Trucks K Rigid 8x4 1:43 CN
75 pcs - 113597 Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1:43 CN

sections.invoice_value:
113974 Renault Trucks K Rigid 8x4 1:43
113597 Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1:43
113599 Renault Trucks T High tractor 4x2 1:24
sections.rule_applied: Prioritet 1 – Artikelnummerverifiering (4.3.2). Samtliga tre artikelnummer identifierade exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Samtliga tre artikelnummer (113974, 113597, 113599) och produktbeskrivningar återfinns exakt i fakturans artikeltabell. Varubeskrivningarna matchar ord för ord.

sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3D (4.4.5.5) – Summering av radvikter inom samma faktura.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 113,30 KG GROSS i ruta 7. Fakturan saknar en totalviktsrad men anger vikt per artikel i Kg-kolumnen: 23,34 + 44,46 + 45,50 = 113,30 KG. Summan matchar exakt certifikatets angivna bruttovikt. Undantag 3D tillämpat.

Certifikatet anger 'China' som ursprungsland. Fakturan har en explicit CoO-kolumn (Country of Origin) där samtliga tre artiklar visar 'CN', vilket är ISO-koden för Kina. Normalisering China ↔ CN är tillåten. Samtliga artiklar har samma ursprung.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints show MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values ≥ 0.96, well above 0.85 threshold.
